For additional context about technologies to be used, project structure,
shell commands, and other important information, read the current plan at:

- specs/008-rest-timer/plan.md (active feature — Rest Timer)

Also read all specs inside the backend and frontend folders for historical context.

IMPORTANT: Before implementing any task, also read specs/technical-decisions.md.
This file contains cross-cutting technical decisions, resolved bugs, and coding rules
that apply to ALL specs and ALL tasks. It supersedes any contradicting inline comment.
When a new bug is resolved, add it to the "Registro de Bugs" table in specs/technical-decisions.md.
